chunks.text:
Winn's Real Handy — Handyman service for all home repairs. Services:
- General home repairs
- Carpentry
- Drywall repair
- Painting
- Furniture assembly
- Door and window repair

Contact Information:

- Email: winn@winnsrealhandy. com
- Website: https://winnsrealhandy. com/
- Service Area: Dallas-Fort Worth area

Rating: 5 stars with 29 reviews.
